trans-unit.source: Email must be a valid email address
trans-unit.target: D' E-Mail-Adrässe muess e gültigi E-Mail-Adrässe si
S' Passwort muss mindeschtens 8 Zeiche lang si

trans-unit.source: Activation was successful. You can now log in.
trans-unit.target: D' Aktivierig isch erfolgriech gsi. Du kasch di jetzt ilogge.

trans-unit.source: Something went wrong with the activation of your account. Please click on the following link to get another activation email:
trans-unit.target: Bi dr Aktivierig vo dim Konto isch öbbis schief gloffe. Bitte klick uf dr folgendi Link, um nomol e Aktivierigs-E-Mail z' erhalte:
S' Passwort muess mindeschtens 8 Zeiche lang si

trans-unit.source: Email must be a valid email address
trans-unit.target: D' E-Mail-Adrässe muses e gültigi E-Mail-Adrässe si

trans-unit.source: There is no match data available for this player.
trans-unit.target: Für dä Spieler sind keini Spieldate verfüegbar.

trans-unit.source: Available Players (Drag & Drop Players to the Team-Containers)
trans-unit.target: Verfüegbari Spieler (Drag & Drop Spieler zu de Team-Container)
Sänd e E-Mail-Yladig an d' Spieler.

trans-unit.source: Won / Lost / Drawn Matches per Game
trans-unit.target: Gwunneni / Verloreni / Unentschiedeni Partie pro Spiel

trans-unit.source: Won / Lost / Drawn Matches per Team
trans-unit.target: Gwunneni / Verloreni / Unentschiedeni Partie pro Team

trans-unit.source: Won / Lost / Drawn Matches per Player
trans-unit.target: Gwunneni / Verloreni / Unentschiedeni Partie pro Spieler

trans-unit.source: Please enter your e-mail address so that we can send you a reset link.
trans-unit.target: Bitte gib dini E-Mail-Adrässe i, damit mir dir e Zruggsetzigs-Link schigge könne.

trans-unit.source: The request to change the password has been sent. Please check your e-mail inbox.
trans-unit.target: D' Afrog zum Ändere vom Passwort isch verschiggt worde. Bitte überprief di E-Mail-Ygang.

trans-unit.source: Please choose a new password and confirm it
trans-unit.target: Bitte wähl e neus Passwort und dues beschtätige

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to Re-Calc all Ratings? This could take some time.
trans-unit.target: Bisch sicher, dass de alli Bewärtige neu berächne möchtsch? Das ka e bitz Zyt in Aschpruch näh.

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to delete all Chat Messages? This could take some time.
trans-unit.target: Bisch sicher, dass de alli Chatnochrichte lösche möchtsch? Das ka e bitz Zyt in Aschpruch näh.

trans-unit.source: At least one Player has to be in each Team.
trans-unit.target: Mindeschtens ei Spieler muess in jedem Team si.

trans-unit.source: Your Password has been successfully updated.
trans-unit.target: Di Passwor isch erfolgriech aktualisiert worde.

trans-unit.source: Your Personal Information has been updated.
trans-unit.target: Dini Persönliche Informatione sind erfolgriech aktualisiert worde.

trans-unit.source: You can only upload one Image.
trans-unit.target: Du kasch nur ei Bild uffelade.

trans-unit.source: Your Settings has been successfully updated.
trans-unit.target: Dini Ystellige sind erfolgriech aktualisiert worde.

trans-unit.source: Dark-Theme Settings were reset because the Settings were not saved.
trans-unit.target: Dark-Theme-Ystellige sind zruggsetzt worde, will d' Ystellige nid gschpeichert worde sind.

trans-unit.source: Your Dashboard Layout has been updated.
your registration was successful! Please confirm the Email you just received to complete the activation process.
trans-unit.target: dini Registrierig isch erfolgriech gsi! Bitte beschtätige s' E-Mail, wode grad erhalte hesch, um dr Aktivierigsvorgang abzschliesse.

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to remove the Game
All Ratings has been successfully recalculated.
trans-unit.target: Alli Bewärtige sind erfolgriech neu berächnet worde.

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to recalculate all Match Qualities? This could take some time.
trans-unit.target: Bisch sicher, dass du alli Spielqualitäte neu berächne möchtisch? Das ka e bitz Zyt in Aschpruch näh.

trans-unit.source: All Match Qualities has been successfully recalculated.
trans-unit.target: Alli Spielqualitäte sind erfolgriech neu berächnet worde.
Neuberächnig vo de Spielqualitäte erfolgriech abgschlosse

trans-unit.source: All Chat Messages has been successfully deleted.
trans-unit.target: Alli Chatnochrichte sind erfolgriech glöscht worde.

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to delete all Live Matches? Note: the State of the normal Match will no be changed.
trans-unit.target: Bisch sicher, dass du alli Live-Spiel lösche möchtisch? Hiwies: Dr Status vom normale Spiel wird nid gändert.

trans-unit.source: All Live Matches has been successfully deleted.
trans-unit.target: Alli Live-Spiel sind erfolgriech glöscht worde.

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to recalculate all Rating Histories? This could take some time.
trans-unit.target: Bisch sicher, dass du alli Bewärtigshistorie neu berächne möchtisch? Das ka e bitz Zyt in Aschpruch näh.

trans-unit.source: All Rating Histories has been successfully recalculated.
trans-unit.target: Alli Bewärtigshistorie sind erfolgriech neu berächnet worde.

trans-unit.source: Successfully sent a Password Reset Email
trans-unit.target: Email zum zruggsetze vom Passwort erfolgriech verschiggt
